macro.intro: The macroeconomic landscape is characterized by rising inflation with CPI YoY at 330.29% and stable interest rates at 3.64%. The 10Y-2Y yield spread has slightly narrowed to 0.5%, indicating potential caution in long-term growth expectations. No major economic events are scheduled today, allowing markets to focus on geopolitical developments and corporate earnings.

snapshot.name: WTI Crude Oil
snapshot.note: Supply concerns due to Iran conflict

snapshot.name: VIX
snapshot.note: Risk-off sentiment due to Middle East tensions

setups.name: WTI Crude Oil Long Setup
setups.rationale: WTI Crude Oil is trading at $82.45, driven by supply concerns from the ongoing conflict in Iran. The EU's warning of prolonged energy shocks supports a bullish stance. With no major economic events today, focus remains on geopolitical developments.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events today, focus on geopolitical news

metrics.label: Volume
metrics.text: Increased buying volume supports bullish case

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: De-escalation in Iran could drop prices below 79.00

setups.hedge: Consider shorting Brent Crude if WTI drops below 79.00.

setups.name: S&P 500 Short Setup
setups.rationale: The S&P 500 is at 4520.75, nearing overbought levels. With the market in extremely overbought territory, as noted by CNBC, a short position could capitalize on a potential pullback.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events today, focus on technicals

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Continued rally could push index above 4550

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX if S&P 500 breaks above 4550.

setups.name: EUR/USD Long Setup
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is trading at 1.0950, benefiting from dollar weakness as geopolitical risks weigh on the USD. The narrowing 10Y-2Y yield spread suggests caution in USD strength.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events today, focus on geopolitical impact

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: USD recovery could push pair below 1.0880

setups.hedge: Consider short USD/CHF if EUR/USD drops below 1.0880.

contrarian.body: Gold is trading at 1985.30, with safe-haven demand potentially overextended. With no major economic events today, a short position could capitalize on a pullback if geopolitical tensions ease.
contrarian.warning: Geopolitical tensions remain high. Unexpected escalation could push gold above 2000.00, triggering stop.

avoid.reason: Tech stocks are in overbought territory, as noted by CNBC.
Rising fertilizer costs impacting farmer finances.
